title: WebNami vs Wix — A Free, Faster Blog Without the Drag-and-Drop Lock-in
description: Wix charges $17–$159/month and locks you into its editor. WebNami is free, open source, and generates a blazing-fast static blog you fully own.

hero.heading: A faster, free alternative to Wix for bloggers
hero.subheading: Wix is a website builder that happens to have a blog — you pay a monthly fee, get a slow JavaScript-heavy site, and can never export your content cleanly. WebNami is purpose-built for blogging: fast, free, and built on files you own.

reasons.heading: Actually free
reasons.body: Wix's free plan forces Wix branding and ads. Paid plans start at $17/month. WebNami is free and open source — host it on any static hosting provider at zero cost.

reasons.heading: Pages that actually load fast
reasons.body: Wix sites are notorious for heavy JavaScript bundles and poor Core Web Vitals. WebNami outputs static HTML that loads instantly with no client-side rendering overhead.

reasons.heading: Escape the walled garden
reasons.body: Wix content can't be cleanly exported to any other platform. WebNami stores every post as a Markdown file — move to any platform, any time, with zero friction.

reasons.heading: Better SEO by default
reasons.body: Static HTML is exactly what search engines love. WebNami generates clean URLs, proper meta tags, and sitemaps automatically — no extra app or premium plan needed.
